title: Projectile Trails
description: This is a simple mod for the Fabric Loader, that adds configurable/toggleable particle trails to projectiles!
body:
**⚠️IMPORTANT⚠️** This mod requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).
**Mod Description** _Ever wanted every projectile to have a particle trail effect behind it? Then you came to the right place!_ **Projectile Trails** is a simple client-sided Minecraft mod for the **Fabric Loader**, that adds configurable/toggleable **trails** to ANY Minecraft projectile (Arrows, Firework Rockets, Ender Pearls, Snowballs, Eggs, e.t.c), adding a nice visual effect to projectiles. Here are the commands that change the trails' particle, and toggle the mod ON/OFF: **Change Particle Type:**
/setprojectiletrailparticle (some particle examples: flame, crit, cloud).
**Toggle Mod ON or OFF:**
/toggleprojectiletrails
A list of Minecraft particle IDs (for the placeholder in command), can be found [here](https://minecraft.fandom.com/wiki/Particles). For a visual of this mod, please play the **Mod Demonstration Video** below, or view this mod's screenshots in the **[Gallery Tab](https://modrinth.com/mod/projectile-trails/gallery)**.
**Mod Demonstration Video**
**Donation** If you want, you can support me by donating with the link on this page.
